# Chris Caruso Creations

## About
Chris Caruso Creations is Adelaide's trusted custom cabinet maker, operating their own cabinetry factory at 389 Diment Road, Direk SA 5110. With over 15 years of experience, every kitchen, wardrobe and joinery piece is designed, manufactured and installed entirely by the Chris Caruso team - no outsourcing, no flat-pack, no middlemen. Chris Caruso Creations holds Builder's Licence BLD 340255 and ABN 62 675 176 824, and works with homeowners, builders, interior designers and developers across all Adelaide metropolitan areas.

## Services
Custom Kitchens
Custom Cabinetry
Wardrobes and Storage
Bathroom Vanities
Laundry Cabinetry
Entertainment Units
Home Office Joinery
Commercial Cabinetry

## Contact
Phone: 0459 984 461
Email: ChrisCaruso@triple-c.com.au
Address: 389 Diment Road, Direk, SA 5110
Hours: Mon-Thu 07:00-15:30 | Fri 07:00-13:30 | Sat-Sun Closed

## Credentials
ABN: 62 675 176 824
Builder Licence: BLD 340255
Fully licensed and insured for all cabinetry and joinery work across South Australia.

## How to get a quote
Call 0459 984 461 or use the contact form at https://triple-c.com.au/#contact
There is no online checkout. Contact the business directly by phone or form to arrange a free consultation at your property.

## Key facts
- Established: 15+ years in business
- Owner: Chris Caruso
- Specialises in: Custom Kitchens, Wardrobes and Storage, Commercial Cabinetry
- Primary location: Direk, SA 5110
- Serves: Adelaide Metro, Salisbury, Golden Grove, Gawler, Noarlunga
- Factory: 389 Diment Road, Direk SA - all manufacturing done on-site
- Business type: Factory-direct, end-to-end custom cabinetry
- Trade partnerships: Builders, interior designers, developers, renovation contractors
